entry.title: Re: Report to update PGI status in SAP EWM
entry.content: Thank you @katrin_kraemer for your response. I think in formal cases, we can follow these checks, Our delivery has no OD (FDO), somebody deleted not sure how. Even ODO(PDO) one some lines they 0'd quantities and some lines shows picked. The ones 0'd has DGI 9 and other has 1 status And DCO anyways 1 for all In ODO no DOY relevant itseems. For some reason they deleted, cancelled and corrupted the delivery due to which it is sitting with status "partially completed" And its belongs to year 2020. we thought that it does not make sense to, deep drive and check who has done and for what reason. So we are checking if there is any report available to close old deliveries, like similar one have in ECC VL_COMPLETE, just update status to closure.

entry.title: Re: Calculated Measures Subtracting Data from Different Months
entry.content: t does not return anything. I tried what I thought was the solution, but it didn’t work at all. Do you have any ideas?

entry.title: Re: Plan Data Upload Starter - Directly upload plan data from a local Excel or CSV file via Story
entry.content:
So we have figured it out and I can confirm that for normal users ( not ADMIN) the data locking principle holds true and stops data being loaded into a closed version. 

There are a extra settings on the roles that need to be checked to allow people to use the upload but once you figure that out its all good 

Thanks

Russell

 

SAP KBA Note 2604397 provides the minimum permissions required to upload a CSV file into SAC. At minimum your user needs:

  • Create permission on either Analytic Model or Planning Model.
  • Execute permission on Personal Data Acquisition.
    => Without this permission, you cannot choose option "Import a file from your computer" to create a new model.
  • Create and Read permissions on Connection.
    => Without the two permissions, you will get error message "The upload failed due to an unexpected internal server error. Please try again later. If the problem persists, please contact your system administrator" when uploading file.

entry.title: Re: Calculated Measures Subtracting Data from Different Months
entry.content: Since I am not too familiar with SAC, I suggest you to look out for some sort of documentation about how to actually extract data from a excel file in SAC. Your problem is NOT that your way/code doesn't work as you posted. Your problem is that you (most likely) use the WRONG code to do the task. If you manage to extract *some* data you will be able to fit together the calculation 🙂

entry.title: SAP GUI 8 - CL_SALV_TABLE view in Excel opens in place
entry.content:
Hi all, I was developing a small report on our CRM with SAP_BASIS 750 0026 and SAP_ABA 750 0026. During development we switched to SAP GUI 8 patch 8 from SAP GUI 7, and the behaviour of the "view in Excel" button switched to in place instead of opening an Excel application window outside SAP GUI. No SAP update on the server was done at this time.

I am using this code:

try.
  cl_salv_table=>factory(
    importing
      r_salv_table = lr_alv
    changing
      t_table = lt_display_data ).

*   enable toolbar for e.g. Excel button
    lr_functions = lr_alv->get_functions( ).
    lr_functions->set_all( abap_true ).
  catch cx_salv_msg into lx_salv_msg.
    message 'error' type 'E'.
endtry.

With the old SAP GUI version the Excel button opened a new Excel window. After the update I now get Excel in place, which is worse for our use case,especially as we cannot save (it saves a temporary file that cannot be overriden, and "save as" is not available in this mode, it seems).

I have tried to figure out how to force opening in an Excel app window, but so far have not had luck.

entry.title: Re: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Cloud or On-Premise? Not an “either or” option, but a str
entry.content: @ONavas no additional costs for the usage of SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition. If additional services / BTP environments are activated (not required for SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition), you may face additional costs.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - LDAP imported users cannot login
entry.content:
I figured it out by now.

I checked again the database entries and found out, that in the table dbo.identity the users had a wrong entry in the domain column. I changed it and now its working.

This might come due to our underlying active directory. We are using univention and not MS AD, so that´s probably the cause.

entry.title: Re: Project Issue and Change Management in PS -S4HANA wit...
entry.content:
Without CPM or any other non standard tool. Using standard SAP PS,  I did apply Project Version to map change order and it works. 
In addition, CN41N report is one of powerful report that you can use to create and compare every Change Oder / Project Versions.

entry.title: Steer the future direction of SAP Build at the SAP BTP Usability Event
entry.content:
Do you work with SAP Build products like Workzone, CDS-Modeller, Build Apps, SAP Build Process Automation, UI5? Would you like to help steer the future direction of these products?
Then our exclusive 2-day SAP BTP Usability Event is for you!
(Last remaining seats still available. Book yours by November 15th)

Join us on November 25th & 26th, 2024 at our headquarters in Walldorf, where you can:

  • Gain early insights into SAP's product vision, ideas, and research projects
  • Share ideas directly with the development teams and influence product development
  • Participate in the development of products that better meet your needs and help your business
  • Provide valuable input on new features directly to the engineering teams during 1:1 usability testing sessions
  • Access expert talks and networking opportunities

What next? Please write me a DM (direct message) before November 15th to secure your place, and I can send you all the details around the registration, full agenda, accommodation etc.

Looking forward to seeing you there! #btpusabilityevent #sapbuild #usertesting

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - Complex integration with with SAP BTP BRM - SFTP
entry.content:
Hi @rhviana,

In this blog post, I noticed that the term SAP BRM appears to be used interchangeably with SAP BTP BRM.  Since "SAP BTP BRM" isn’t a service on BTP, could you perhaps clarify the terminology to help readers easily understand the context?  Instead of SAP BTP BRM, do you actually mean the classic SAP BRM on NetWeaver?  An update to this blog post might be helpful to avoid any potential confusion.

entry.title: Re: My favourite SAP Cloud Integration feature: Content Filter
entry.content: @MortenWittrock I am unable to use the filter for a larger xml whose size is more than 3 mb. I am able to apply the filter for small xml but not for large xml. Please suggest.

entry.title: Re: Changing the SO date
entry.content: Thank you, Jack. Appreciate the help.

entry.title: Converting SELECT OPTION to upper case
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have an issue converting a SELECT-OPTION variable to upper case.

If my input is done in upper case (e.g. *JHON*), this works(i.e., returns data):

DATA w_name TYPE lfa1-name1.
SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK block-1 WITH FRAME.
  SELECT-OPTIONS s_name FOR w_name NO INTERVALS NO-EXTENSION.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK block-1.

TRANSLATE s_name-low TO UPPER CASE.
SELECT * FROM lfa1 WHERE name1 IN @s_name INTO TABLE @DATA(itab).

Now, as soon as I try to enter the data in lower case (e.g. *jhon*), the Select does not return any data, although doing a debug shows the value for s_name in upper case (after the TRANSLATE).

I know that there are a lot of workarounds that I could use, but I’ m curious why the difference, even though the variable's value seems to be the same.

TIA,

Luis

entry.title: Re: CR2020 viewer print output is incorrect when PrintMod...
entry.content:
Deeply thank you for taking time to test it.

But, using the exactly same rpt file with the same data, if I open it with CR Designer and directly print it thru Designer's Print menu item, (the shown up printer dialog is the same as POC mode's printer dialog of .NET CR viewer component), and, again, choose the same Cute PDF Printer as target printer to generate PDF file, then generated PDF content is correct!! ("Correct" means the same as PTP mode's print-out)

If POC printing dialog and/or Cute PDF Printer cannot handle such custom-paper sized & margins report, why Designer's POC printing can produce correct result on Cute PDF Printer?

entry.title: Re: Welcome Touchpoint - Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP
entry.content:
@InesRomero 

I had the same error.

To fix that: 

  •  I changed the version of @sap/cds to the lastest one (currently 8.4.0) due to error on requirement when running the command npm i
  • Copy the file xs-app.json so to /app so that it's in the same folder as services.cds
  • Remove the folder "Router" if one has been created previously
  • Run the command 
    • cds add approuter --for production
  • Delete MTA file mta.yaml
  • Run again the commands
    • cds add mta
    • npm update --package-lock-only
  • Adjust MTA file
  • Run the commands 
    • cds build --production
    • mbt build -t gen --mtar mta.tar
  • Deploy again the application

entry.title: Re: Converting SELECT OPTION to upper case
entry.content:
It's happening because your reference to translating S_NAME-LOW is in the header row, and not an update to the internal table that stores the data used in the query.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: How to Deploy 'btp-procurement-data-extractor' in SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you managed to fix the issues? I am encountering the same problems.

entry.title: Re: Oracle 19c Database to S4 Table data migration using SAP DATA SERVICES
entry.content:
Hi

You can't update SAP tables directly as target tables in BODS, rather you can use IDoc to post the Oracle data based on functions such as addresses, customer, material or purchase order etc. You can also use ABAP functions to post the data in tables (write ABAP functions in S4 and import it in BODS and use in Data flow). I hope this clarifies your questions.

Best Regards,

Kamlesh

entry.title: Re: Converting SELECT OPTION to upper case
entry.content:
Remarks

  • LFA1-NAME1 domain is NAME and allows lowercase characters.
  • You should also translate HIGH subfield not only LOW (else wrong RANGE can trigger dump)
  • You should translate the whole internal table and not only hearder line (LOOP required)
  • Use field LFA1-MCOD1 which is in uppercase (should be identical to NAME1 but converted)

For recent versions you can use upper SQL function (WHERE UPPER(NAME1) IN <RANGE>)

entry.title: Re: Converting SELECT OPTION to upper case
entry.content: Thanks. That should do the trick (using MCOD1)

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - Complex integration with with SAP BRM - SFTP

entry.title: Query about HR loans (infotype 45)
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to know if it is possible to suspend a loa (infotype 45) for a period of time without having to pay it off and create a new one with the remaining amount.

entry.title: Multi-serials quality notifications
entry.content:
Hello the community,

We have the need to manage muti-serial numbers into the quality notifications (because we have serialized production orders with quantity > 1) and to be able to indicate a decision in front of each of them (S/N 1 accepted, S/N 2 scrapped, S/N 3 rework...)

But It seems not possible in S/4HANA Public Cloud version to manage more than one serial in a quality notification.

I have seen the possibility to implement business functions (OPS_QM_NOTIFICATION and OPS_QM_EXTENSIONS) in ECC6 version but what about S/4HANA Public Cloud version ?

Is there other way to manage it ?

Best Regards,

Gilles

entry.title: Re: Understanding the Basic SAP Revenue Accounting and Reporting (RAR)
entry.content: Good blog! I do have a question on the reporting paragraph: "Reporting and Analytics: SAP RAR has likable reporting and analytics which deliver the information on how the revenue recognition activities, compliance status, and financial performance are performed. Generating customized reports and dashboards is very possible for the users to follow the key metrics and trends very closely." Are there standard reports that provide this information?

entry.title: Calling All SAP Partners: Join the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Cycle-3 2024!
entry.content:
Attention SAP partners! We're excited to let you know that the third cycle 2024 of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative is in full swing, offering you an exclusive opportunity to collaborate with SAP on shaping the future of our products. By working closely with our developers and product managers, you'll gain early access to innovative development ideas and play a direct role in influencing SAP’s product strategy. 

This is your chance to make an impact and contribute your insights to upcoming SAP products and applications. Don't miss out - register for current projects by November 15, 2024! These projects are specifically open to SAP partners, and we look forward to hearing your valuable perspectives and ideas:

SAP S/4HANA & SAP S/4HANA Cloud

  • Composable Enterprise: Reimagining Enterprise Software for Unprecedented Business Agility 
  • Help Where and When You Need It: User Assistance in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • Improve your Post Upgrade Tests(PUT) Experience - An Integrated and Smart approach to PUT
  • Insightful Analytics for Actual Costing
  • Joule applications to SAP S/4HANA Utilities
  • Monitoring End to End Master Data Replications in SAP Cloud ALM
  • New Cost Settlement for real estate scenarios (Service Charge Settlement / CAM)
  • Purpose as base for processing of S/4HANA Business Partner personal data – concept and migration”
  • Research: SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit - AI: Field Mapping Proposal

SAP Business Technology Platform

  • AI Agent Builder - A Low-Code Innovation with SAP Build
  • AI-Powered Autonomous Sandbox
  • Discover SAP Build Process Automation Triggers: Empowering Experts to Automate and Extend Use Cases
  • GenAI Content Provenance and Authenticity via Watermarking
  • Knowledge Graph RAG on unstructured Data

Customer Experience

  • Redesigned SAP Sales Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Outlook

Data & Analytics

  • SAP HANA Database Migration to SAP HANA Cloud (XSC,XSA,CAP)

SAP Globalization

  • AI-supported Extension of Electronic Document Processing of SAP Document and Reporting Compliance
  • Localization as a Self-Service for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition with Business AI

Lifecycle Management

  • Business Service Management in SAP Cloud ALM operations
  • Clean Core / RISE with SAP Methodology Dashboard in SAP Cloud ALM

Others

  • Early Talent Management with SAP SuccessFactors

We believe that collaboration is key to unlocking innovation. By joining forces with our customers and partners, we can collectively shape the future of SAP’s products and change the way businesses operate.

Don't delay – register today on influence.sap.com and be a part of the SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Cycle 3 in 2024!

Warm regards,

Your SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Team

Follow-up after registration: When you register for a project, you will be invited to an introductory call with the SAP project lead. At this point further participation is optional. Typically, all activities are governed by the Feedback Agreement with SAP.

entry.title: Update WBS element CJ20N
entry.content:
Hi ABAPers,

I am creating WBS elements Via CJ20N , Requirement is when i save the Below fields should default as check.

Tried lot of BADIS related workorder and other there is no changing parameter for WBS element's data. its only for importing.

Could you please help me to get correct BADI/Exit for update WBS elements in CJ20N.

entry.title: Re: New Course Home and AICC Wrapper Content - Launch button always required?
entry.content: Hi Robert, our company had the same issue, which is one of the reasons that we decided to not enable New Course Home as part of our b2305 upgrade. Sadly, we didn’t have that option with the b2405 upgrade. Once we determined that SAP had not fixed the issue, I started to look for a workaround. Basically, the issue is that with New Course Home enabled, SuccessFactors will not allow external URLs to open in the AICC Wrapper screen. In other words, if you use a URL for a PDF file on your SAP iContent server, that PDF will open very nicely within the AICC Wrapper. So, the workaround that I produced is kind of simple. I created an HTML file that excepts the document URL as an input parameter and displays it in a full size/borderless frame. That file is placed on our SAP iContent server. Then the content object’s Content URL would be set to <<<URL to the Frame File on the iContent server>>>?url=<<<URL to the document on the other server>>>. For example, https://icontent.successfactors.com/FrameWrapper.html?url=https://documents.mycompany.com/MyDocument.pdf. That tricks SuccessFactors into thinking that the file is coming from the iContent server. Allowing it to open in the AICC Wrapper. That solution should fit the needs of most companies. Sadly, for my company, it works great on the desktop application, but our companies SSO has an issue with it on the mobile app. Given this, I tried the easy and logical solution of using the direct URL in the content object’s Mobile Filename and the prefixed one in the Content URL field. That way, the user experience would work well using either access method. But of course, that highlighted another New Course Home issue, for which I have raised a support ticket. For some reason, when the Mobile Filename field is populated and the user is on a desktop, using New Course Home, SF decides to launch that mobile URL, instead of the one in the Content URL field. If New Course Home is disabled, it launches the correct URL. Once again, if you don’t use or it doesn’t affect the experience on the mobile app, you should be good using the “Frame Wrapper” workaround. Please let me know if you decide to try it and if it fills your needs.

entry.title: Re: cl_abap_conv_in_ce Class is not permitted in the beha...
entry.content:
Hi @dinesh_kumar45, 
Try using CL_ABAP_CONV_CODEPAGE (Class) as CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE is deprecated.

BR, 
Oleg

entry.title: Re: How to connect SAP Data Services to Dataverse
entry.content:
Hi

I don't think there is direct connection option available in data service, but you can think of generating a CSV file from one system and then picking it in BODS and updating the tables in target system.

Best Regards,

entry.title: SAC/SAP S4/HANA EXCEL EXPORT AND IMPORT
entry.content:
Hi team,

I am having an issue of toughts because it was given to me a database on SAP S4/HANA to export data to an excel and then import to SAC, but all the data is accumulated and they asked me to present by each month and year. First i tried to export each month by itself, but when i get to February the data of that month comes with january too, so that outcome its not possible, so i tried to add and Calculated measure, the idea was "if the date was = to 202402 the measure on the excel of february would subtract to the measure of the excel file of january so i only had the numbers of february, but i tried everything and i couldnt reach an out come by using all the commands of SAC.

If anyone could help me i would eternly gratefull.

Have a blessing day

PS: I will leave here an print of the excel. This excel doesnt have an date registered on it, i know the month because o filter them in SAP before i export.

 

Bernardo Santos

entry.title: Re: Calculated Measures Subtracting Data from Different Months
entry.content: I will investigate, thanks for your time 🙂

entry.title: Accessing Odata attribute value in a controller extension of a fiori elements application
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I'm a bit lost in the methodology of Fiori elements applications using the RAP model with an OData v4 service. 

Backend-wise, I have a full CDS model (with parent/child entities) that are exposed as an OData v4 service. Frontend-wise, I have a Fiori elements application with a controller extension. 

What I am looking to do, is to have the labels of a my child attributes be determined dynamically based on the value of another attribute in the OData entity. Question is: how can I access the value of the attributes in my controller extension? 

I figured out that in the events that can be overwritten (onInit, onBeforeRendering, onAfterRendering), the OData call hasn't occurred yet, so I attached function _onDataReceived to the dataReceived event of the Model (oModel.attachEventOnce("dataReceived", this._onDataReceived.bind(this)); ) in the onBeforeRendering function. 

This method is being called and I can see that the OData call is performed before it. I am expecting the actual data in aResults (code below), but it is empty. 

        _onDataReceived: function (oEvent) {
            const oModel = this.getView().getModel();
            const oData = oEvent.getParameter("data");
            var aResults = oData.results;
        }  
 
How/Where can I now access the data?

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - Complex integration with with SAP BRM - SFTP
entry.content: @rhviana, I am still a little confused by what you mean by "SAP BRM in the Cloud".  SAP does not offer SAP BRM as a cloud product.  Are you just referring to the scenario where the customer is hosting the classic NetWeaver SAP BRM on a hyperscaler?

entry.title: Re: Creation of locations during integration with SAP TM
entry.content:
Hi  Michael,

Thanks for the wonderful document. Are the locations which are created on fly generally be only be a shipping point/ customer and plant?  or can we also have a one time location created for other types of vendors like Freight service agent? we have a requirement to have a Freight service agent to have a OTL created from the delivery doc data. is it possible?

Thanks,

Archana.

entry.title: Road map to a successful Enterprise Architecture
entry.content:
A strong enterprise architecture (EA) practice is foundational to many IT optimization and transformation initiatives, including application rationalization, technology obsolescence risk management, ERP transformation, and application modernization. But building a successful EA practice has to be done the right way, with the right tool. Here’s a simple overview of the critical steps in the process. @LeanIXDaniel 

Enterprise Architecture Roadmap
https://www.leanix.net/en/download/enterprise-architecture-roadmap

entry.title: Material Master Product Category
entry.content:
We are in the process of converting from ECC to S4.

In ECC, the Material Master Product Category field (ATTP frame) is free form. There is no value table supporting the  domain. Once you entered a value (any value), it subsequently appears in the dropdown. See the highlighted documentation below:

“The product category works based on content. There is no Customizing needed. Any value can be entered here and can be reused through the value help once assigned to the first trade item. When the product category is deleted from the last trade item, it ceases to exist and is not available in the value help anymore.

In S4, the domain does have an assigned value table (/STTPEC/PRDCAT) that is empty, and thus no values appear in the drop down.  Users can still enter any value, but it’s not “saved” in a dropdown.

I don’t know how to populate that value table. When I tried via SM30, it dumps.

Thanks, Leo

entry.title: Re: MDK Custom client build failed
entry.content:
Hello @bill_froelich,

I am using MDK Version: 6.3.1-001 and SSAM MDK Plug-In version: 2210.0.1

as per the MDK support matrix i can verify the combination. but still i am getting the above error. Could pls suggest ?

Thanks,

Rupesh

Anjali.

does anybody know if it is possible to keep the original text of the individual items forwarded to the period 000 of the new fiscal year with the Balance Carry Forwart task in Group Reporting, instead of the text "BCF"?

Thank you! Best regards

entry.title: Re: CAP-Apps crashes after deploying when trying to start
entry.content: Hello Felix, were you able to solve your issue? I am facing the same problem while deploying with cds version 5, however it has worked before..

entry.title: Still unable to pass DateTime parameters with "MS OLE DB Driver 19 for SQL Server" (MSOLEDBSQL19)
entry.content:
This got already asked once, but unfortunately it didn't receive a proper solution yet. I just tried it again with the latest SP36 and the latest version MSOLEDBSQL19. The problem still exists!

If my store procedure has a Date or Datetime Parameter, the report fails with a Syntax error when using "MS OLE DB Driver 19 for SQL Server" (MSOLEDBSQL19).

With "MS OLE DB Driver for SQL Server" (MSOLEDBSQL) the generated query is:

"DBNAME"."dbo"."STORED_PROCEDURE_NAME";1 {d '2023-02-14'}, {d '2023-02-14'}

with "MS OLE DB Driver 19 for SQL Server" (MSOLEDBSQL19) the generated query is:

"DBNAME"."dbo"."STORED_PROCEDURE_NAME";1 CONVERT(DATETIME, '02-14-2023', 110), CONVERT(DATETIME, '02-14-2023', 110)

The second query contains a syntax error. Does anyone know how to get it to format the query like the first way while using the newer driver?

And before anyone suggests it, staying on the older drivers is not an acceptable solution. We have rolled back to "MS OLE DB Driver for SQL Server" (MSOLEDBSQL) as a temporary work around while we look for the permanent fix for all our existing reports. Sooner or later we have to go to MSOLEDBSQL19, since only there you get the latest security features like TDS 8.0. Therefore you currently can't force "Strict Encryption" in SQL Server.

entry.title: Re: Data Locking Ownership in SAP Analytics Cloud: Lessons Learned and the Need for a Master Lock
entry.content:
Hi @IgorK,

Thanks for this write-up and highlighting the customer influence request. It is a frustrating limitation in SAC, and unfortunately since I raised the request, no progress has been made. I hope it sees some attention from SAP soon.

Thanks,

Hugh

entry.title: After upgrading to ByDesign 2411, how can you edit/modify form templates?
entry.content:
As the test tennants have already been upgraded to the next version, now it is impossible to edit/modify custom form templates, as it is pointed out in the "What's new" documentation. However, we created our localized forms as custom forms or at least as new variants of the provided forms. Now we are unable to edit them, even as an advanced user the only option is to 'Download' them, nothing more.

Is there any suggested workaround for this situation?

Thanks for your suggestions!

András

entry.title: Development Goal Plan - Evergreen or Yearly?
entry.content: In early 2024, we migrated to latest goal management, and at that time, we changed from an ‘evergreen’ development goal plan to a "yearly" development goal plan.  We are considering changing back to an evergreen/ongoing development goal plan.  Interested in knowing if there are any disadvantages of having one vs. yearly development goal plans, and what other customers have configured.

entry.title: Hiding My Teams Position
entry.content:
Hello,

One year ago, we have removed the visibility of Position Orgchart from Managers and moved the management of positions to the HR function. With the last release, My Teams Position tile is available to managers on their owns team under Company Info.

We intended to hide the My Teams position tile from the managers, to avoid confusion and (so that they see in the system only whatever is relevant to them).

We received the response that this is automatically on and can't be controlled separately via RBP.

Did anyone had similar challenge? and found a way to hide My Teams position tile from the Company Info?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Alternates in Bill of Materials and backflushing
entry.content: Hi! If my answer was helpful, please consider accepting it as solution.

entry.title: Re: cl_abap_conv_in_ce Class is not permitted in the behavior defination
entry.content: As you already asked before, you already know that CL_ABAP_CONV_CODEPAGE has replaced CL_ABAP_CONV_IN_CE. Why do you ask again exactly the same question to obtain the same answer? (your first question followed by my answer: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/upload-excel-using-sap-rap-only/bc-p/13928217#M170140)

entry.title: Re: Multi-serials quality notifications
entry.content:
Hi @Gilles2 

 

The assignment of multiple serial numbers to a quality notification is not currently available in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

The BADI's available in S/4HANA CLoud Quality Management is documented at 

Business Add-Ins (BAdIs) in Quality Management None are suitable for this requirement

 

There was an influence request raised for this functionality to be included 

 ( https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/330747/?section=sectionVotes )

The decision made was :

Please note that we will not longer plan developing the Q-notification in the S/4HANA Public Cloud. Instead, we are transitioning to using the Defect and a modernized object to consolidate multiple Defects. We plan to enhance the Defect with a serial number feature to effectively address the problem.

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: MESSAGE Unable to resolve plug-in "com.sap.adt.ddic.table.ui" ADT Eclipse Connect to SAP BTP
entry.content:
when trying to connect Eclipse to SAP BTP via ADT  it says

 

Failed to get service instance URL info for https://XXX.abap.us10.hana.ondemand.com: java.util.concurrent.ExecutionException:

Using Eclipse version 2024|09 or Version 4.33

I have first posted my question in Eclipse forum, but as "That looks like an issue with ADT connecting to a service endpoint run by SAP, so either way, it's either something ephemeral
that will resolve itself, or you'll need to reach out to SAP for support."

So, now I am asking for help.

it seems related to the last update a couple of weeks ago. The "create an ABAP cloud project" is not letting me to input the whole file with my service keys, instead if asking for "Extract the URL from the service key and afterwards popping-out the error above: "Failed to get service instance URL info for"

I have found the error subject in  the log in Eclipse

MESSAGE Unable to resolve plug-in "com.sap.adt.ddic.table.ui

If you see in the attachment it is true that his plugin is missing

is there a way to uninstall only this plugin?

Is this the correct place to ask about ADT?

is ADT under the scope of SAP or Eclipse?

entry.title: Re: Multi-serials quality notifications
entry.content: adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Manufacturing

entry.title: Re: How to freeze list report columns in Fiori elements.
entry.content:
Hey Ashutosh, 

I found a solution for your problem. You can add the column freeze option like this:

Add the onInit method in your ListReportExtension controller and enable column freeze option.

onInit: function() {
            debugger;
            this.byId("YourSmartTableId").getTable().setEnableColumnFreeze(true);
        }

Found the solution through this post https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-remove-freeze-option-in-fiori-list-report/qaq-p/12519838  

Kind regards,

entry.title: Hiring SAP SuccessFactors Senior Consultant - Onboarding 2.0 and Recruiting (USA)
entry.content:
Monument Consulting is hiring a fulltime SuccessFactors Senior Consultant to join our growing SuccessFactors practice. If you hold active certifications in SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0 and SuccessFactors Recruiting and want to work for a company that is built on a commitment to our people, this may be the position for you!

Find more information on Monument Consulting and our open position(s) on LinkedIn: (9) LinkedIn or on our careers site: Careers | Monument Careers.

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting Posting

entry.title: How can I deploy an UI Integration Card to WorkZone through CLI
entry.content:
I created an UI integration card through Business Application Studio. I want to version my project through GitHub and setup a pipeline to automatically deploy it on an Advanced Work Zone instance once we merge.

I already found some build script examples on this repository provided by SAP.

Is there a way for us to deploy the created artifact through CLI so we can automate this process through GitHub Actions or any other type of CI/CD tool?

Thanks in advance for any support!

entry.title: Re: 2H 2024 - VRP-13823 - Refresh Employee History by Emp...
entry.content: Hi Balaji, it could be that it only shows if changes were made for specific employees. Since you got an error message maybe it didn't trigger. I am still trying to figure out with my own testing under what circumstances the message you received gets displayed. I've got a lot of meetings today and won't be able to provide an input until tomorrow or Thursday.

entry.title: freeze report column
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Can we freeze a column in a report we created?

entry.title: HCM Brasil - eSocial S-1.3 - Entrega final
entry.content:
Olá pessoal,

Estamos orgulhosos em anunciar que concluímos a etapa final das nossas entregas relacionadas ao eSocial S-1.3.

Nesta última fase, nos dedicamos à revisão das transformações XML de todos os eventos padrão eSocial para estar de acordo com a nova versão do layout e a Nota Técnica S-1.3 Nº 01/2024. Além disso, realizamos mudanças importantes na geração e visualização dos principais eventos impactados: S-1010, S-1200, S-2299, S-2399, S-5001, S-5002, e S-5011.

Antes de darmos detalhes sobre a entrega final, gostaríamos de fazer uma rápida retrospectiva dos principais pontos abordados nos dois blog posts anteriores:

Na primeira fase focamos em entregar todas as modificações dos eventos de escopo limitado, fornecendo aos nossos clientes e parceiros mais tempo para se adaptarem aos seus sistemas. Atualizamos também o documento de entregáveis, com o detalhamento das interfaces de BAdI disponíveis para o complemento da solução.

Na segunda fase, realizamos todas as alterações relacionadas ao evento S-1210 - Pagamentos de Rendimentos do Trabalho. Isso inclui a habilidade de retificar as informações enviadas no ano anterior, sem a necessidade de reabrir os períodos anteriores.

Agora, na terceira e última fase, após a revisão das transformações XML e adaptações necessárias, finalizamos a entrega do eSocial S-1.3. Esta etapa crucial garante que nossos clientes e parceiros estejam atualizados e em conformidade com as últimas normas legais e técnicas.

Aproveitamos esta oportunidade também, para comunicar que realizamos um evento detalhando este novo layout. O evento "eSocial S-1.3 - Potencializando a experiência da solução SAP" foi uma manhã repleta de insights e conhecimentos sobre a nova versão. 

Gostaríamos de agradecer a todos nossos clientes e parceiros que se juntaram a nós neste evento. Foi extremamente valioso para todos os presentes. Você encontra a apresentação e gravação deste evento no nosso Work Zone.

Nesta etapa final, entregamos as alterações necessárias através das seguintes SAP Notes:

  • 3501788 - eSocial - New S-1.3 option for layout configuration
  • 3508286 - eSocial S-1.3 - Transformations objects for standard events without changes
  • 3528070 - Framework - Adjustments to support many employee data in PAL Log output
  • 3525532 - eSocial - Employee Summarizing Events Viewer - Adjustments to use output reporting framework
  • 3517450 - eSocial S-1.3 - Payroll events - S-1200, S-2299 and S-2399
  • 3517449 - eSocial S-1.3 - Transformation objects for payroll events - S-1200, S-2299 and S-2399
  • 3517448 - Prerequisite objects for SAP Note 3517449
  • 3515537 - Prerequisite objects for SAP Note 3515535
  • 3515536 - eSocial S-1.3 - Prerequisite transformation object for SAP Note 3515535
  • 3515535 - eSocial S-1.3 - Table events - S-1000/S-1010
  • 3522167 - Prerequisite objects for SAP Note 3522166
  • 3522166 - eSocial S-1.3 -  Update Visualizador de Eventos Totalizadores de empregador for S-5011 event
  • 3532294 - Prerequisite objects for SAP Note 3531706
  • 3531706 - eSocial S-1.3 - Summarizing Events Viewer - New layout information of S-5001 and S-5002

Lembrando que todas as entregas referentes ao eSocial você consegue encontrar na SAP Note 3418378 - eSocial - Overview - 2024.

Agora, com a finalização deste projeto, encorajamos todos a revisar as atualizações, familiarizar-se com elas e garantir a conformidade com os novos requisitos em seus próprios sistemas. Destacamos que o ambiente de produção restrita do eSocial já está configurado para envio de eventos na versão S-1.3. Na entrada 2.20 das perguntas frequentes do eSocial você encontra as datas parametrizadas para que seus testes possam ser realizados.

Por fim, é de extrema importância manter seus sistemas atualizados para que a instalação das SAP Notes ocorra de forma mais suave e rápida. Neste link disponibilizamos um documento com os pré-requisitos de Support Package mínimos.

Se tiver alguma dúvida, sugestão ou comentário sobre este post, sinta-se à vontade para compartilhar na seção de comentários abaixo.

Não se esqueça de dar um "like" neste post se você achou útil e compartilhá-lo com seus colegas. Siga a tag HCM Payroll Brazil na SAP Community para se manter atualizado sobre as últimas notícias.

Obrigado por nos acompanhar nesta jornada.

Um abraço,

Anderson Marques

entry.title: What to use when? - Let’s explore SuccessFactors APIs
entry.content:
Introduction

In this blog we will try to explore the types of APIs in SAP SuccessFactors (Employee Central [EC] module), i.e. SFAPI and OData API (V2). What are the capabilities these APIs have? What to use when and some project-based recommendations.  

Please note, this blog is written based on my experience and learnings during my project engagement. The challenges I saw during project implementations and support I will be highlighting. Feel free to contribute 😊.

Both the APIs has own sets of capabilities.

Different types of APIs

Compound Employee API OData V2

Used to extract employee data out of EC.

 

It replicates employee master data from EC to SAP systems, payroll systems, and benefits systems. 		It's intended to enable access to SAP SuccessFactors data in the system.
Protocol – SOAPProtocol - OData
Operations – Used for query only

Operations –

CRUD (Create, Read, Update and Delete) operations

Endpoint –

https://{api-server}/sfapi/v1

Endpoint –

https://{api-server}/odata/v2
Spoiler
Link to explore SuccessFactors EC APIs - Business Accelerator Hub

Capabilities of using CompoundEmployee API

  • Fetches requested data of an employee in a single call, with a hierarchal structure response in XML.
  • Replicates only data that has been approved in EC.
  • Response compares all time slices of all entities specified in the request.
  • Considering the performance aspect, only those fields which are needed during the replication process are fetched by the APIs.
  • *In standard SAP integrations CompoundEmployee is used – e.g. [Replicate employee master data and organizational data from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central to SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA].
  • Different query operations fetch data based on different time slices – back dated, effective dated and future dated records.
  • *In single API response current and changed records can be fetched based on query parameters.

Challenge – API returns all the fields of the portlet; doesn’t support to select specific fields while querying (e.g. “job_information” portlet will return all the fields. Specific fields can’t be queried).

Below is the response snippet of “personal_information”, “employment_information, and  “job_information” portlets – action and changed values.

Spoiler
Link to SAP SuccessFactors HCM Suite SFAPI: Developer Guide

Capabilities of using SuccessFactors OData APIs (V2)

  • Support methods for create, read, update and delete operations.
  • Lightweight output – supports JSON format apart from XML format.
  • Supports back dated, effective dated, and future dated query output.
  • API query supports selective fields to fetch ($select)
  • Supports Navigation ($expand). Recommendation – Avoid Large $expand Statements (using $expand to join a large number of tables can lead to poor performance).

Challenge - If there is a need to fetch the previous value of a field (e.g. Previous cost centre), then this is not possible in the same API call. We have to implement additional logic to fetch that (run a loop and compare relevant field change).

Spoiler
Link to SAP SuccessFactors API Reference Guide (OData V2) - Developer Guide

What is deprecated? 

Spoiler
Please Note - SFAPI is deprecated as of August 1, 2018. Please use OData for new development and consider moving your legacy applications and integrations to OData

Does this mean, CompoundEmployee is deprecated? No, this is the only SFAPI which is not deprecated and there is no plan date for the same as well as this is widely used in SAP standard contents. Means, we can still use this API based on case-to-case basis.

Probable scenarios for using CompoundEmployee

  • While designing global payroll integrations – where bank is expecting current and change records of an employee based on period delta.
  • While replicating employees of org data from SuccessFactors to HCM based on delta changes.
  • Replicating employee and position data between two SuccessFactors.
  • SuccessFactors integration with Ceridian Dayforce.

*Above are some of the project cases where I have considered CompoundEmployee API over OData API (V2).

Conclusion

  • CompoundEmployee can be considered for employee replication scenarios where a single API can fetch most of the data in a hierarchically structured response.
  • OData API (V2) can be considered where limited set of fields are expected from a an API.
  • In case of update records into SuccessFactors, OData API (V2) to be considered as CompoundEmployee API supports only query operations.

entry.title: BOBJ Trigger file not created, how can I run scheduled reports today?
entry.content:
Hi,

Our Business Objects reports (webi) are triggered daily by a flag placed on a JDE file and a text file created. The flag was not set overnight last night and reports were not run. I reset the flag this morning and deleted and re-created the text file on the BO Apps server, but neither set the reports to run.

I am really hoping there is a way to work around itand set the reports to run because there are about 120 daily reports that I hope I do not have to run manually!

The trigger text file is in folder C:\BOBJ_JobStatusIndicators on the BOApps server. The text file name is BOBJ_Ind_SalesComplete.txt.  I have deleted it and re-created it which usually works but it may be too late in the day for it to respond?

BO 4.2sp3.

Suggestions greatly appreciated!

TIA.

Best regards, Emna

entry.title: Re: Creating localized attribute by a custom type
entry.content:
As mansurarisoy pointed out, localized types are really Map types under the hood. So that means your robot will have a different cable in different parts of the world. For example the cable attribute may have values like these:

en_BRcable1
en_UScable2
decable3
frcable3
fr_CAcable2
escable3

where the left column contains ISO codes for the languages (LanguageModel existing in the platform); and the right column contains PKs of the corresponding Cable items. This makes sense, if the cable is some standard cable acceptable in that part of the world. If it's just about the unit of measurement, this design is an overhead and no localization is needed at all, in my opinion.

Now, about the impex. This is impex documentation to use in addition to the links provided mansurarisoy.

I found a few problems with it:

  1. The usage of the Document ID (see Document ID section in the link above), i.e. &cabId. It's not needed because it's not referenced anywhere else. Not really a problem - just a redundant value.
  2. The localized attribute does not specify the locale for the value (see Localizing section in the link above).
  3. Incorrect reference of the cable. The Cable type does not have code attribute (actually no unique attributes at all to identify the cable). So, to reference a cable we need to reference all its attributes. See Item Reference Attributes in the link above.
  4. catalogVersion macro is undefined and the value is not provided. I'm going to remove it, but if it's a required attribute of the Robot, then it has to be provided.

I think, the corrected impex should be like this: 

 

INSERT_UPDATE RegionCable; code[unique=true]
                         ; EU  ;

INSERT_UPDATE Cable; length[unique=true]; lengthUnit(code)[unique=true]
                   ; 2                  ; m

UPDATE Robot; code[unique=true]; cable(length, lengthUnit(code))[lang=en]
            ; ROBOT            ; 2:m

entry.title: Add translation in mass for technical object type in SAP pm
entry.content: Hi All,Is there a way to add the translations in mass..? Please let me know.Thanks.

entry.title: Re: MESSAGE Unable to resolve plug-in "com.sap.adt.ddic.table.ui" ADT Eclipse Connect to S
entry.content: Yes, it's the correct place. It's only a community; for information, the official SAP Support is at https://support.sap.com (for access, ask an S-User to your company).

entry.title: Re: Attachment handling in CPI
entry.content:
Hi Naveen,

In one of my requirement, attachment was being sent from Service Now--> CPI --> Azure DevOps. In my case, I asked to send the attachment in Base64 format and then decoded the same using the decoder available in CPI pallet and uploaded the attachment to a specific URL(part of Azure DevOps).

Hope you get some idea, if you want more details you can elaborate your requirement.

Thanks,

Nidhi

entry.title: Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP - error 403 after deployment

Note:

When i run the command cds watch, i have this line : 

[cds] - using auth strategy { kind: 'mocked', impl: 'node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/auth/basic-auth' }

entry.title: Error in CDS syntax in one system but its fine in another system?
entry.content:
Hello,

The Eclipse (version June 2023 release) is showing an error on the below CDS syntax, unable to save/activate it in our ECC_System_1, but same code is saving/activating fine in S/4_System_2. The error red mark I am seeing at LEFT and RIGHT syntax in CASE statement, if I remove the whole CASE statement then its saving/activating fine

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'YSD_SHP'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'SHP data extract'
define view ZSD_SHP_EXTRACT as select from prps
    inner join proj as proj on proj.pspnr = prps.psphi
{
    key prps.pspnr as pspnr,
        prps.objnr as OBJNR,
    case left( prps.objnr, 2 )
     when 'PR' then right( prps.objnr, 8 )
     else ''
     end as WBS,
     prps.prart as prart,
     prps.psphi as psphi,
     proj.pspid as pspid
}

 

Thanks

entry.title: how to find SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition DB size
entry.content:
Hi, 

Is there a method to find out the DB size of S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition? 

i believe, 100GB is provisioned by default. how do we know our current utilization?

entry.title: Re: Winning together: SAP Signavio Process Explorer and SAP Signavio Process Navigator join forces
entry.content:
Hi Naveen_M1510,

yes, both SAP Signavio Process Explorer and Process Navigator are founded on SAP EAM, the process models follow the same entity relationship model.

Best regards

Holger

  • Tracking has been set to Manager (no overrides in any of the individual playback modes)

entry.title: SAP Partner Headlines: The Latest News Delivered Straight to You
entry.content:
In today's fast-paced business world, staying informed about the latest developments is crucial—especially when it comes to navigating SAP’s extensive ecosystem. We understand that keeping up with the constant flow of news and updates from SAP can be a challenge. That's why we're excited to introduce SAP Partner Headlines, a new video series designed to bring you the most important updates in a concise, easy-to-digest format.

Why SAP Partner Headlines?

As SAP continues to evolve, it’s essential for our partners to stay up to speed on the latest programs, events, and strategic changes. However, with so many valuable updates coming from different corners of the organization, it’s easy to feel overwhelmed. SAP Partner Headlines was created to address this need. Each instance will focus on highlighting key developments that impact your business—timely changes, new initiatives, and major announcements that partners should prioritize.

This series is not meant to diminish the value of other news but to make sure you're kept in the loop about the changes that matter most. Our goal is to support you in staying informed and empowered to take full advantage of the opportunities within SAP’s ecosystem.

The First Episode: Key Announcements

In our inaugural episode, we’ll cover two major updates:

  1. The launch of SAP’s new Development Fund for SAP PartnerEdge, which consolidates our market and business development funds into one streamlined approach, aimed at accelerating partner growth and cloud practice development.
  2. SAP TechEd on Tour, where you can continue your learning journey with in-person, deep-dive sessions on SAP’s latest technologies.

Stay Connected

Don’t miss out on the latest SAP partner news—stay informed by subscribing to our newsletter today. We look forward to bringing you the essential updates you need, when you need them, through this exciting new series.

entry.title: Re: Updating the schema of CAPM without losing the data.
entry.content:
Hi @JinoyVarghese ,

Most likely you are looking for Schema Evolution, could you take a look at it, please?

Regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS - How to Reset the Result?
entry.content:
This issue is resolved with SAP Note.

3293588 - How-to update blank result with BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS?

entry.title: SD self-billing - SAFT
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are working on the SD self-billing process for our project. This is a Portuguese company, and the end customer sends the self-billing document. Our company needs to create the billing document using the SD module to "replicate" the document created by the end customer and handle all subsequent processes.

We want to ensure compliance with Portuguese legal requirements. According to our customer, this SD self-billing document should not have a digital signature and should not be included in the SAFT file.

We have a specific SD document type and a specific number range for this type of document. However, according to SAP Note 2642802, “Since the publication of Despacho 8632/2014, all documents generated in SD (invoices, credit notes, debit notes, pro-formas, deliveries, etc.) must be digitally signed.” This means we cannot create an SD invoice without a digital signature.

We have tried to find information on how to exclude the digital signature in SAP documentation (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9b351d6e33a0496598e4b58782565e8a/9ce5465761a14af4908511c0348360b3.html) or in the SAFT for Portugal user guide PDF from SAP (https://help.sap.com/doc/a3fc11aded07460d99f1f938e1c29496/6.18.latest/en-US/User%20Guide%20for%20SAF-T%20Portugal%20v1.15.pdf), but we could not find this scenario in the documentation. In these two links, we found information about self-billing in the MM (Materials Management) scenario, but not in the SD (Sales and Distribution) scenario like ours.

We have a few questions:

  1. How can we create an SD billing document without a digital signature in this particular scenario?
  2. How should we customize our billing type to indicate that this is a self-billing document?
  3. How can we exclude this document from the SAFT file? According to Chapter 4.2 of the SAFT for Portugal user guide, we did not find this scenario covered.

Thank you for your help.

#SD #SAFT #Portugal #selfbilling #DigitalSignature #SIPT

Ana Machado

entry.title: Highlight Critical materials in IH01
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to highlight Critical materials in yellow in IH01.  I have looked at BADI_EAM_STRUCTURE_LIST but I can't figure out how to make that work or if it is the correct BADI.  It is used in Form OBJECT_TYPE_COLOR in program RIIFLO10, Include MIHIXF40.  All materials are red and we would like the Critical materials to stand out and be highlighted in yellow. 

Thank you for any suggestions.

entry.title: Re: FTE and Proration examples in Compensation
entry.content:
Hi @xavierlegarrec, 

This note have helped me on various previous implementations before.  I have a quick question re the H22024 release in preview.  The isActualSalaryImported="false" tag seems to disappear when I try to add it to the XML via Provisioning and save.  Have you seen this before (there are some warning relating to translatable fields). Have the validations change to not be able to save during a warning and must that be cleared for this to be updated?

Thank you

Liezl

entry.title: Re: Cost Center Budgeting control per GL account
entry.content: You should be able to use the GL account group functionality in the budget availability control profile for cost centers. You can assign GL account 123/987 into different G/L account group, and assign different Tolerance limits to each of them. E.g for GL account 123, you will have the activity group Error at 50% of the total, vs. GL account 987 error out at 100%, in your specific example above.
